function.outcome_justification: Using context time 2026-03-31, 139 days ago anchors to 2025-11-12. An exact-date search for prefix 2025_11_12 in 50_finance/purchases returned zero matches. The only located Hörnbach Österreich bill was 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_03__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md, whose purchased_on field is 2026-01-03 and whose raw seal set line_eur is 8, which is outside the allowed ±3-day window around 2025-11-12. Therefore the requested dated purchase cannot be identified from the available records.
